text: We were honored to fly our loyal friend and hero, Kaya, home to rest after a lifetime of hard work. Throughout her career, Kaya flew with us over 250 times to help establish the PAWS Act which united Veterans with service dogs. We are so grateful to be a part of her legacy, and we thank her and her owner, Cole, for their many years of service. ❤️

text: We are a proud partner of the @honorflightnetwork, an organization dedicated to celebrating America’s veterans by flying them to Washington D.C. to share in a day of honor at our nation’s memorials. While all of our Honor Flights are memorable, this one had an extra surprise as one of our Captains switched his schedule around to surprise his dad by piloting the flight! This Veterans Day, and every day, we honor all those who have served and are still serving. Thank you for your bravery and sacrifice.

text:
We are a proud partner of the Honor Flight Network, an organization dedicated to celebrating America’s veterans by flying them to Washington D.C. to share in a day of honor at our nation’s memorials.
 
While all of our Honor Flights are memorable, this one had an extra surprise as one of our Captains switched his schedule around to surprise his dad by piloting the flight!
 
This #VeteransDay, and every day, we honor all those who have served and are still serving. Thank you for your bravery and sacrifice.

#vereran #hero #airforce #honorflight #heartwarming #feelgood #fatherson #military #veteransday

text: Companion Pass® is the benefit that allows you to choose one person to fly with you, free of airline charges (does not include taxes and fees from $5.60 one-way) every time you purchase or redeem points for a flight. To qualify, you must fly 100 qualifying one-way flights OR earn 135,000 qualifying points* in a calendar year! Once you earn Southwest® Companion pass, you get it for the remainder of the year; you earned it, and the following full calendar year!

text:
A Mother's Day that they won't forget. 💙 ❤️ 💛 

Our first ever Mother & Daughter Pilot duo, Holly & Keely, were able to fly together from Nashville to New York in honor of Mother's Day. To make the trip even more special, we invited country singer @Honey County to perform the song "Got It From My Mama" live at 35,000 feet on their flight! 

Happy Mother's Day to all the moms and mother figures out there! #SouthwestHeart #gotitfrommymama #happymothersday #motherdaughterduo #honeycounty

text: Some love stories only get better with altitude! Joel and Shelley first met more than 30 years ago at an Air Force Base. What started as a workday errand quickly turned into something neither of them could forget. Together, they’ve logged nearly 1,400 flight hours side by side. And get this... they'll celebrate 30 years of marriage later this month! Join us in wishing them a happy anniversary and a wonderful Valentine's Day 💙❤️💛

text: Yesterday marked an exciting new chapter; assigned seating is here! As daylight swept across the seven time zones we serve, our Employees began implementing changes while taking a moment to celebrate the sunset of open seating and the beginning of our new era. We’re bringing more comfort, more ease, and more of the Southwest Hospitality you love. 💙 ❤️ 💛
